Created attachment 194310
diff between py-matrix-synapse-0.31.1 and py-matrix-synapse-0.31.2

This is a just a minor version bump for the latest security update (see [1]), which addresses room hijacking in certain situations as far as I can tell.

Builds und runs fine for me[tm].

Cheers,
Sascha

[1] https://github.com/matrix-org/synapse/releases/tag/v0.31.2
